2 yeast bottles or 2 cubes (50 gr) fresh yeast

instructions: Heat the evening in the resistors at 100°C for 10 minutes and put it out to make the dough swell.
Melt the butter in a pot over low heat only until it melts, without boiling. Remove and leave it a little lukewarm.
Liquid materials: In a bowl, beat the eggs with wire until they are joined. Add the milk, lukewarm butter, sugar, salt and vanillas. Beat 1-2 minutes until the sugar dissolves.
Dry materials: In the mixer's bowl, add the flour for tea and dry yeast and mix. We open a puddle. If we use a machete and mastic, we add them now.

Add the liquid iredients to the flower. With the fermentation hook, knead 1.5–2 minutes at low speed, until the flower is wet and the dough starts to form. Strengthhen at medium speed and knead 7–8 minutes, until the dough becomes smooth, soft and elastic.

First bubble: Butter the hands, give the dough a round shape and place it in a large buttered bowl. Cover with membrane or fresh towel and leave in a warm place for about 1 hour and 15 minutes, until double.

veal-with-peppers-argiro.name: Veal With Peppers
instructions: Cut the meat into ports first and add half the olive oil to the pot (from the total quantity of the retrieve) for 6–7–1.
Add the garage and finely chopped onion and sauce for about 5 minutes until it becomes clear.
Add the wine and let it boil 2–3" in a strong heat.
Add the tomato and simmer for 1 hour and 30 minutes until it softens well.
If necessary, add a little water because in the end we want it to stay only with its oil. Not with too much sauce!
When the meat is already ready, heat the remaining olive oil in a deep pan and sauté the peppers for 4–5–1, to oil well.
We sprinkle with parsley.
Pour the peppers into the meat.
Add salt and pepper and complete the cooking for a few more minutes.

vegan-mushroom-and-kale-soup.name: Vegan Mushroom And Kale Soup
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add potatoes, carrots, celery, and onion. Cook and stir until fragrant, 3 to 5 minutes. Add broth, 1 package of mushrooms, salt, herbes de Provence, pepper, and bay leaf. Cook until vegetables are soft, 15 to 20 minutes.
Place kale in a separate saucepan over low heat and add water to cover. Cook until tender, 5 to 8 minutes. Drain excess liquid.
Coarsely chop the second package of mushrooms.

Fill blender halfway with the vegetables and broth. Cover and hold lid down with a potholder; pulse a few times before leaving on to blend. Pour into a pot. Repeat with remaining vegetables and broth. Pour all of the pureed soup back into the saucepan. Add the kale and chopped mushrooms. Let simmer until mushrooms are just tender, 5 to 10 minutes more.

vegan-pastry-with-minced-mushrooms-argir.name: Vegan Pastry With Minced Mushrooms

instructions: We start the vegan pastichio that has nothing to be jealous of the classic pastichio by first making the mushroom minced sauce.
In a wide pot heat the olive oil to burn.
Add the chopped mushrooms.
Sauté to drop their volume into a high fire.
Add the chopped onion and garlic. Mix and sauce the onion for a few minutes.
Add the spices and tomatoes.
Add salt and pepper.
Lower the focus. Simmer the mushroom minced meat for 15’.
Vegan minced meat must be juicy at the end.
We're pulling out of the dorm.
Add the chopped walnut and mix the sauce.
Alternatively, instead of mushrooms you can use soy minced meat or a mixture of the two.

vegan-pecan-pie.name: Vegan Pecan Pie

ingredients.prep: melted over low heat, if needed

ingredients.item: Bottom crust of vegan pastry dough

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (205°C).

In a large bowl, combine the sugar, flour, and salt. Mix thoroughly with a whisk so that the starch is evenly dispersed, then whisk in the coconut oil. Add the maple syrup and whisk thoroughly, followed by the almond milk and vanilla.

Place the pie dish with bottom crust on a baking sheet. Pour in the filling, making sure to scrape the entire contents from the sides of the bowl into the pie. Sprinkle the pecans over the top or arrange the nuts in concentric circles if you’d like an especially elegant presentation. Bake the pie for 10 minutes, then reduce the heat to 177°C (175°C) and bake for 40 minutes more. The filling should be thick and bubbling at the edges.

Transfer the pie to a cooling rack and allow to cool to room temperature before serving. The pie will keep for up to 1 week at room temperature.

vegan-strawberry-muffins.name: Vegan Strawberry Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease 2 muffin tins with cooking spray.
Mix soy milk, applesauce, vinegar, and vanilla extract together in a bowl.

Sift white whole wheat flour and whole wheat flour together into a separate bowl. Add oats, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl. Mix in soy milk mixture until smooth. Let batter sit for 5 minutes.
Fold strawberries into the batter. Fill muffin tins 2/3 full of batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until muffin tops are brown and sides pull away from the tin, 30 to 40 minutes.

instructions: Peel the onion, garlic teeth and clear the peppers and pumpkin. He cuts everything into small pieces.
Warm an olive oil frying pan with salt and pepper. Meg and cold the vegetables till they get to the dente.
Vierte el tomate frito y mezcla. Cocina por 4 minutos.
Add the frying pan into a ceramic saucer or a plate. It incorporates into the middle the care egg that does not break the yolk.
Hornea for 10 minutes at 180 ° C till the egg seizes.
Once ready, enjoy!

vegetable-gratin-argiro.name: Vegetable Gratin
instructions: Clean the broccoli, cut it into tassels and wash it.
Clean the sweet potatoes and cut into frame or thin slices.
Wash the baby carrots well. We don't peel them, we cook them whole with their peel and their taste is unique.
In a boiling pot add salt and broccoli.
Boil for 4-5 minutes.
Remove the broccoli in a colander with a perforated spoon.
In the same salted water that boils, add the baby carrots and sweet potatoes.
Boil for 7’.
We drain them.

vegetable-pies-argiro.name: Vegetable Pies
instructions: In a bowl, add the flour and salt and mix.
We puddle the flour and add the oil, raki, lemon and water.
With a spoon, mix the ingredients and start to form the dough.
When the dough is collected in a ball around the spoon we put it on a floured counter.
With strong movements and flouring hands whenever necessary, knead the dough for a few minutes until it becomes soft and supple and does not stick to the hands.
Place the dough in a bowl and cover for at least 30′ to rest.
After resting, divide it into 4 pieces.
On a floured surface, spread each piece of dough into a thin sheet with the molder.
With a knife we cut square leaves.
At the center of each leaf, touch 1 spoons of filling.
Close in the shape of an envelope leaving the surface a little open.
After we're done with the weeds, we can bake them, fry them or store them in the freezer.
Wash and drain the grass well.
Cut them into small pieces.
In a plate pot heat the oil and sauté the dried versions for 2-3′′.
Add the grasses and mix for a few minutes.
Add salt and pepper and add the fresh onions and fennel.
Place the filling in a colander and let it drain well.

venezuelan-arepa-sifrina-recipe-comedera.name: Venezuelan Arepa Sifrina Recipe
instructions: Inicia la receta, haciendo la masa.
In a bowl, place the flour and salt and mix with a scatula.
Then add water and melted butter. With the help of hands, previously clean, mix everything with slow movements and get a smooth and manageable mass. Save her.
If you notice that more water or flour are required, you can add more. A compact but very soft and easy to mold mass should be left.
Warm an iron, frying pan or grill with medium heat and grease with oil.

Now, your dough and make balls. The size will depend on your tastes, I recommend that you make them small so that the final result has a crispy cape. You can be guided by the dimensions of a golf ball.

After you do all the dough balls, put them delicately with both hands to get the characteristic shape of the arepas. We know that this process consists of a lot of practice but we assure you that it's easy.
I recommend that you do the thin arepas so that their cooking will be faster and have a cracking shape. Put the arepas onto the frying pan or plate previously heated.
Cooking for 10 minutes from both sides. When you see that our Arepa has some kind of "Concha or crusts," the turn. Repeat this step across. See more details about how the arepas are performed here.
Para el relleno, toma la pechuga cocida, y desmenuza o deshebra en partes no tan finas. Lo ideal es que nuestro relleno tenga textura. Agrega la pechuga en un bol.
Peel them avocado and put his whole pulp into a bowl. With the help of a fork, snap till it's as bad as purée.
Agrega sal y pimienta al gusto y el cilantro. Mezcla todos los ingredientes.
Ahora, vierte esta mezcla al bol del pollo junto a la mayonesa.
It's a good mix till it's creamed. Test and rectify the taste, you can add salt if necessary.
To complete the arepas, open with care with the help of a table knife. That's a tradition in Venezuela.
Then fill with the chicken and avocado mixture and finish with a portion of grated yellow cheese.
Your sifrina arema's ready to eat. Enjoy!

very-chocolate-ice-cream.name: Very Chocolate Ice Cream
instructions: Combine milk, sugar, cocoa powder, and salt in a saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a simmer, stirring constantly.
Place egg yolks into a small bowl. Gradually whisk in about 1/2 cup of hot milk mixture, then return to the saucepan. Heat and stir until thickened, but do not boil.
Remove from the heat and stir in chopped chocolate until melted.
Pour into a chilled bowl and refrigerate, stirring occasionally, until cold, about 2 hours.

Stir in cream and vanilla. Pour mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer’s instructions, about 20 minutes. Transfer ice cream to an airtight container and freeze until firm.

victory-at-sea.name: Victory At Sea
instructions: Whisk mayonnaise, lemon zest, and 1 tablespoon lemon juice in a small bowl. Season lemon mayonnaise with salt and pepper and set aside.
Toss frisée with oil and remaining 1 tablespoon lemon juice in a medium bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
Spread lemon mayonnaise on cut sides of rolls. Build sandwiches with rolls, white anchovies, and frisée mixture.

vietnamese-iced-coffee.name: Vietnamese Iced Coffee
instructions: There are two ways to make Vietnamese coffee. The simplest method is to steep coffee grounds in a heatproof container with 2/3 cup boiling water for 4 minutes. Pour through a coffee filter into a heatproof glass.

Or use a metal filter, which we recommend. Bring 1 cup water to a boil. Remove top screen from filter, add coffee, then screw on top screen. Place filter over a heatproof 12-oz. glass or measuring cup.

Pour a splash of the hot water into filter; this will allow the coffee grounds to bloom. When coffee begins to drip through, add enough water to reach top of filter. Place lid on filter and let coffee drip for 4 minutes. If coffee stops dripping sooner, gently loosen screw to relieve pressure.
Stir in condensed milk until blended. Add ice, stir, and serve.
